title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIT Madras

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIT Madras
jsonLd.description:
IIT Madras, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Madras:
IIT Madras is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Madras!
